app.name: A11yFred
app.tagline: AI-pulingati, miyumiyuwi nipalti accessibility tupurri-minati, manual report-minati pakali-ninati
search.label: Nipalti tupurri-mina palawa-nina
search.placeholder: e.g. modal close button, mara-piti accessible name
search.hint_voting: Vote results up or down to change their ranking — starred results always appear first.
results.no_results_announce: Pakali mina '{query}'. Puta nina minya-kani, tikalaw minya, tali kani-minya pakali.
results.no_results_body: Puta nina minya-kani (tapurra 'button'), tikalaw minya (tapurra 'input'), tali kani-minya pakali.
detail.refine_hint_ai: Nipaluna tana pulingina AI tana rewrite tana. AI model tana or pakana tana
detail.refine_hint_no_ai: Kani takayna, nayri pakana. AI kani
detail.refine_placeholder_no_ai: Nayri: "Pakali Critical severity minya nayri Onboarding Flow. Pakalingathi lower severity pakali tunapri."
detail.rewrite_aria: Note tana save and AI tana selected fields tana revise
detail.confirm_reset_body: Kina timangkati larapuna palawa nara. Milaythina kina palawa larapuna katina.
settings.heading: Takayna
settings.ai_enable_desc: Descriptions minya/lutruwita Suggested Fix AI Instructions-ta nayri miyali.
settings.privacy_body_1: Nayri, mina localStorage-ta browser-ya timana-tina. Mina-ya nara-ya lutruwita server-ya pakana. Timana-tina mina: theme, language, platform filter, Live Search miyali, AI provider miyalina, API keys, rankings, stars, archived mina, pinned mina, nayri timana, custom nayri, corpus edits, minya tayla nayri pakana-tina.
settings.privacy_body_2: API keys browser-ya timana-tina minya AI provider-ya kuta pakana. Mina-ya nara pakana lutruwita. Nayri AI miyali-ta unpin-tina, lutruwita browser site data-ya pakana-tina.
settings.privacy_body_translations: UI translations minya corpus AI-ta translated-tina, lutruwita errors-a nayri. Mina user timana, custom nayri, lutruwita edits translation-ya pakana tiya.
settings.reduced_motion_note: Tiyrani nayri linaythina. Tiyrani nayri palti linaythina. Tiyrani nayri OS accessibility settings linaythina.
notfound.heading: 404: Trawtha mana lipalina
notfound.body: Tana luwanta kani mina. Pulingina tana waranta kani.
party.announce_full: Pakana wara kani! Takayna Comic Sans. Nayri pakana liyini. Confetti kani. Cursor magic wara.
party.announce_reduced: Pakana wara kani! Takayna Comic Sans. Nayri pakana liyini. Cursor magic wara. Confetti mana liyini kani.
kofi.title: Ko-fi kani widget
about.what_body: Tiyrani palti linaythina nayri pakana milaythina. Pakana tiyrani nayri milaythina, nali tiyrani pakana nayri palti.
about.what_wcag: Tiyrani WCAG 2.2 Level A nali AA linaythina nayri palti. Tiyrani nayri pakana linaythina. Tiyrani Level AAA linaythina nayri palti pakana nayri milaythina.
about.step_1_body: Takayna kani liyini — component ngaranyi, elemento mita, kani palawa kani.
about.step_2_body: Priority Up/Priority Down arrows tana nipaluna result tana tunaplikuna. Star tana payintiku. Archive tana pakana.
about.step_3_body: Tana finding nipalitia pakana wara. Results relevance wanta ranked minapalitia.
about.step_4_body: Location prefix tana (e.g. "Global:") or AI tana wording revise tana.
about.feature_ai_body: Pakayi AI tiyrani pakana nayri linaythina. Tiyrani API nayri Anthropic, OpenAI, nali Google. Tiyrani nayri browser linaythina nali nayri palti. Milaythina nayri
about.feature_languages_body: Tiyrani palti linaythina nayri 50 linaythina RTL nayri pakana. Tiyrani nayri linaythina, nali tiyrani palti pakana. Tiyrani linaythina nayri palti pakana, nali tiyrani nayri linaythina. Tiyrani AI linaythina nayri palti, nali tiyrani pakana linaythina. Milaythina nayri
about.feature_party_body: Takayna kani. Pakana ngaranyi. Kani wara.
about.feature_a11y_body: Tiyrani WCAG 2.2 nayri. Tiyrani pakana linaythina, nali tiyrani palti nayri milaythina.
about.coming_auth: Google mana GitHub sign in devices kani.
about.coming_custom: Nayri pakali turaytayingathi kuyani, pulingara cloud minya.
settings.confirm_reset_all_body: API keys takayna mana. Kulira wiya.
settings.unsaved_body: Tiyrani nayri linaythina. Palti tiyrani nayri?
settings.language_changed_announce: Linaythina: Tiyrani Nayri, tiyrani Save linaythina nayri
results.vote_hint: Vote results up or down — higher-rated matches appear first. Star a result to always pin it to the top.
announce.starred: {title} starred — nipaluna relevant results tana payintiku.
settings.voting_on: Vote controls are visible on each result.
about.step_5_body: Description wanta suggested fix steps tana spreadsheet wanta report wanta copy minapalitia.
search.view_all_confirm_body: Nipaluna {count} results tana single page tana.
detail.revise_error_body: Nipaluna revising tana pakana. Save & Revise Selected tana pulingina.
settings.api_key_error: Error: API key tana required AI Assist enabled tana.
error.heading: Nipaluna pakana
error.body: Pakali library pulingara. Nayri connection minya
detail.revise_error_invalid_key: Invalid or expired API key ({provider}). Settings tana key tana pulingina.
detail.revise_error_rate_limit: Rate limit reached ({provider}). Nipaluna tana payintiku pulingina.
settings.reset_all_announce: Mina Settings Reset minya Timana Cleared.
about.what_body_2: Consistency nayri wara, lipalitia tana industry wanta, nayri wara ninti minapalitia tana impact, severity, descriptions, wanta suggested technical suggested fix steps luwanta. WCAG-aligned findings library wanta tunapri, pakana luwanta nipalitia, wara pakana customize minapalitia, wanta copy/paste minapalitia tana audit report wanta.
error.announce: Kanamalanha tani. Milaythina pakana tangkara pakiyana. Tana nara nipalti pakiyana.
about.sources_body: Entries are written in plain language, near-duplicates are consolidated, and each is aligned to a specific WCAG success criterion. Sources consulted include:
detail.copy_all_aria: Pakalayna nara pakala timangkati larapuna kopina
detail.copy_all_announce: [EN] Finding Details / Description and Possible Remediation Steps copied
detail.reset_all_fields_aria: Pakalayna nara pakala timangkati milaythina tana
detail.reset_all_fields_announce: [EN] Finding Details / Description and Possible Remediation Steps reset
detail.edit_lang_warning: Edits are session-only — switching language or finding will reset them.
edit.target_dialog_body: You're editing a finding while viewing it in {locale}.
edit.save_as_personal_desc: Stored locally on this device and private to you. Other languages will be AI-translated unless you edit them manually — translations only run during site maintenance.
edit.contribute_desc: Your edit will be queued for the maintainer to review before it becomes part of the shared corpus.
edit.scope_all_langs_desc: Other languages will be re-translated from the updated English on the next translation pass.
edit.personal_ai_warning: Only {locale} will be saved. Other languages will show AI-translated text. Translations are updated only during site maintenance.
edit.en_switch_dialog_body: Your {locale} version is saved. Here's the English version of the same finding. Make any edits and save, or skip to leave the English version unchanged.
settings.wcag_filter_desc: Show or hide entries introduced in each WCAG version.
results.copy_link_aria: [EN] Copy link to these search results
search.hint_pin: [EN] Pin any result to keep it at the top across all views.
about.feature_pinning_body: Pin any finding to keep it at the top across all searches and views. Use the priority arrows to rank others, star to float a finding to the very top, or archive to remove it from view.
settings.pinned_results_desc: Items you've pinned appear above all search results.
settings.agentic_mode_desc: AI will search your corpus to match your style and technical depth when rewriting.
detail.agentic_mode_help: AI searches the corpus to match your style and depth when rewriting
detail.agentic_mode_hint: AI will search the corpus to match your established style and technical depth
common.sponsored_body: Waratah-mina accessibility-ti parani developer-ti miyumiyuwi-minati. Ninti-piti palawa-pati, mara-piti tupurri-mana, mara-piti nipalti-mana, mara-piti wurruwurru-mana.
onboarding.heading: Palawa-nina A11yFred-minati
onboarding.confirm_body: Mara-piti wurruwurru-mana takara-nina. Pakali-nina miyumiyuwi-ti parani wurruwurru-mana?
onboarding.slide_1_body: Nipalti tupurri-mina palawa-nina: miyumiyuwi waratah, wurruwurru, nipalti WCAG tupurri-mana. Platform-ti parani WCAG Level-ti pakali-nina miyumiyuwi-mana tupurri. Narrow Results-ti pakali-nina nipalti-minati wurruwurru. Tupurri-mina palawa-nina relevance-minati, parani severity-minati.
onboarding.slide_2_body: Rank Up/Down-ti pakali-nina tupurri-mana importance-minati. Star-ti miyumiyuwi waratah palawa-nina takara-mana. Pin-ti miyumiyuwi waratah palawa-nina mina-piti miyumiyuwi-minati.
onboarding.slide_3_body: Pakali nina miyalk tali nina tikarap, WCAG tikalaw, pakali minya, minya-kani warrkawiya. Pakali minya-kani luwarr-kani tali puta (tapurra 'Global:'). AI Assist tali warrkawiya nina pakali minya-kani nina kani-minya, kina pakali tapurr-tapurr tali puta tali tika-kani Copy All tali puta.
search.hint_platform_native_caveat: Native app tupurri-mana web-piti mara-piti miyumiyuwi.
search.hint_ranking: Rank Up/Down-ti pakali-nina tupurri-mana wurruwurru. Star-ti miyumiyuwi waratah palawa-nina takara-mana.
search.narrow_clear_and_reset_aria: Narrow pakali-mana parani miyumiyuwi wurruwurru-minati takara-nina
search.view_all_confirm_archived_one: 1 archived-piti parani miyumiyuwi tupurri-mana takara-mana palawa-nina.
search.view_all_confirm_archived: {count} palawa kani archived-minya mina-kalati list-ta kani-wi.
results.sort_live_hint: Live Search nayri. Pakana-wi kani-minya tumi-la wiya-minya pulingina-ta.
results.sort_smart_info: Smart kani-wi Severity-ta tunapri, wiya-minya pulingina ranking-ta. Starred pakana-wi tunapri; Archived pakana-wi kani-minya. Nayri kani-wi tumi-la.
results.sort_wcag_level_info: AAA pakana-wi tumi-la corpus-ta. Mina-la AAA pakana nayri-la, wiya-minya AAA-ta tumi-la kani-wi best-practice-minya mina-la pulingina.
results.sort_popularity_info: Liyan-wi tumi-la, nayri-la pulingina-wi popularity-ta. Nayri, popularity tumi-la session-ta wiya-minya app-ta kani-wi.
results.rank_hint: Pakana-wi kani-la liyan-wi. Star-ta tunapri. Archive-ta pulingina. (Tumi-la mara-wi.)
results.unpin_from_search: Pakana-wi pinned nayri. Unpin-ta pakana-wi tumi-la.
detail.discard_confirm_body: Kina timangkatiti pakala yapanama katina mina panali nara milaythina tana palawa kani milayti.
detail.ai_revision_hint: Timangkati palawa checkboxes makalayi, notina yapana, nara AI kina palawa timangkati. AI model palawa nara katina, timangkati
detail.finding_note_hint: Pakalayna yapana: mina, palawa notina, nara timangkati. AI Assist palawa
detail.finding_note_placeholder: e.g. Palawa timangkati, Onboarding larapuna. Mina palawa kina milaythina.
detail.ai_revision_aria: AI pakalayna yapana nara palawa timangkati
detail.ai_revision_error_body: Timangkati palawa. Yapana & Timangkati Palawa kina timangkati.
detail.ai_revision_error_invalid_key: API key palawa ({provider}). Settings mina timangkati.
help.take_tour_description: Tiyrani A11yFred palawa kani milaythina pulingina nayri.
help.step_1_body: Tiyrani pakana nipalti linaythina. Platina pakana Settings-na pakayi Web nali Panpayri App tiyrani milaythina (tiyrani nayri web-na). Pakayi +pakana tiyrani linaythina nali -pakana tiyrani pakanaythina (paranta. keyboard +screen reader -wcag2.2).
help.step_2_body: Tiyrani Rank Up nali Rank Down linaythina pakana milaythina. Tiyrani linaythina nayri pakana milaythina. Tiyrani linaythina pakana nayri palti milaythina.
help.step_3_body: Tiyrani pakana nayri milaythina. Tiyrani nayri palti linaythina, nali tiyrani nayri pakana.
help.step_4_body: Pakali minya-kani luwarr-kani tali puta (tapurra 'Global:' tali 'Cart:'). AI Assist nipalawa-kani, puta nina kani-minya tali Revision Notes minya tali AI warrkawiya pakali minya-kani nina luwarr-kani.
help.step_5_body: Tiyrani pakana nali linaythina nayri spreadsheet nali palti. Pakayi Copy All tiyrani pakana linaythina.
help.shortcuts_note: Linaythina nayri tiyrani pakana linaythina. Pakayi tiyrani pakana nali linaythina nayri palti.
about.what_body_2_prefix: Tiyrani pakana nayri palti linaythina. Tiyrani nayri milaythina nali tiyrani pakana nayri palti linaythina. Tiyrani palti nayri pakana linaythina, nali AI tiyrani pakana nayri milaythina, nali linaythina nayri
about.feature_agentic_body: Tiyrani Claude (Anthropic) pakayi, nali Match Existing Style linaythina. AI tiyrani pakana nayri milaythina nali tiyrani palti linaythina, nali tiyrani pakana nayri.
about.examples_ath010_label: Tiyrani Pakana Nayri Milaythina, Nali Palti
settings.party_confirm_body: Tiyrani nayri palti linaythina nali tiyrani nayri.
settings.language_rhg_body_1: Tiyrani AI linaythina nali nayri Rohingya palti nayri milaythina.
settings.language_rhg_body_2: Tiyrani Rohingya palti nayri linaythina. Tiyrani nayri linaythina, nali tiyrani palti nayri milaythina.
settings.platform_all_desc: Palawa kani mina web, native apps, minya documents-a nayri tali.
settings.starred_results_desc: Starred mina nayri timana-ya tali, star-tina order-ta.
settings.archived_results_desc: Archived mina nayri timana-ya tayla-ya tali.
settings.rankings_desc: Nayri-ya up minya down ranks-a kuta-tina. Nayri timana rank-tina, search-ta yapa nayri.
